LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT PATRICK DILLMANN'S MOTION TO DISMISS FOR LACK OF SERVICE AND FAILURE TO PROSECUTE IS CONTINUED UNTIL JULY 3, 2013 ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION IN LIGHT OF THE FACT THAT THERE IS AN ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ON THIS ISSUE SCHEDULED IN DEPARTMENT 610 ON JUNE 25, 2013 THAT REQUESTS THE SAME RELIEF. THE MOVING PARTY SHALL IMMEDIATELY PROVIDE NOTICE TO THE PLAINTIFF THAT THE INSTANT HEARING WAS CONTINUED AND PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF THAT NOTICE WITH THE COURT PRIOR TO THE JULY 3, 2013 HEARING. NO OPPOSITION FILED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT PATRICK DILLMANN'S Motion For Lack Of Service And Failure To Prosecute is Off calendar. The entire action was dismissed by the Court at the Order to Show Cause hearing on June 25, 2013. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Lack Of Service And Failure To Prosecute;
Off Calendar Jun-25-2013 Continued To Jul-03-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT PATRICK DILLMANN's Motion to Dismiss For Lack Of Service And Failure To Prosecute is continued until July 3, 2013 on the Court's own motion in light of the fact that there is an order to show cause on this issue scheduled in Department 610 on June 25, 2013 that requests the same relief. The moving party shall immediately provide notice to the plaintiff that the instant hearing was continued and provide a courtesy copy of that notice with the Court prior to the July 3, 2013 hearing. No opposition filed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
